note: Project-local reference for Zoo Code / Roo Code modes. Use this as the canonical role mapping for this repository. Some clients require custom modes to be copied into global/user settings.

modes.name: Specsmith Architect
modes.description: Plan, inspect, and reason about requirements and architecture. Do not directly edit production code unless explicitly promoted.

modes.name: Specsmith Code
modes.description: Implement accepted preflight tasks with small diffs and tests. Do not approve your own patch.

modes.name: Specsmith Debug / Tool
modes.description: Generate safe commands, parse build logs, inspect outputs, and summarize failures. Avoid large edits.

modes.name: Specsmith Review
modes.description: Review diffs against requirements, tests, and prior decisions. Prefer adversarial critique over rewriting.
